title: AllottedLand.com Dawes quick-search index
description: Starter index for Final Dawes Roll / Dawes census-card leads. Replace or expand records with reviewed public-domain/index data.
source_notes: NARA identifies Final Dawes Rolls, Dawes census cards, enrollment applications, land allotment jackets, and allotment maps as core Five Tribes Dawes records.
Final Dawes Rolls fields include roll number, name, age, sex, blood degree, and census card number.
The census card number points users toward the Dawes census/enrollment card; the roll/enrollment number helps locate the land allotment jacket.

records.notes: Starter test record from NARA's public Dawes Records guide. Verify against the original NARA Catalog image before treating as proof.
records.search_terms: Cherokee Citizen by Blood BB Final Dawes Roll Census Card 4747 Enrollment 11384
